Question: Match the term with its definition or example
Answer:
1) Evaporation - a) Change of water into vapor due to heat
2) Condensation - b) Change of water vapor into liquid droplets
3) Precipitation - c) Falling of rain, snow, sleet or hail
4) Transpiration - d) Loss of water vapor from plant leaves
5) Water cycle - e) Continuous circulation of water in nature
6) Groundwater - f) Water stored beneath Earth's surface
7) Aquifer - g) Underground layer storing water
8) Potable water - h) Safe drinking water
9) Water pollution - i) Contamination of water bodies
10) Sedimentation - j) Settling of insoluble impurities
11) Filtration - k) Removing insoluble impurities using a filter
12) Chlorination - l) Killing germs by adding chlorine
13) Distillation - m) Purification by evaporation and condensation
14) Rainwater harvesting - n) Collecting and storing rainwater
15) Salinity - o) Amount of dissolved salts in water
